title: MiniStack support registry (Axis 1 — API breadth)
description: Evidence-backed record of whether MiniStack emulates a service's API, independent of any IaC tool. One row per service in the target scope. See services/README.md.

status.description: MiniStack emulation status for this service's API.

evidence.description: Human-readable basis for the status — what was checked in MiniStack source/README.

evidenceUrl.description: A real, checkable MiniStack source/README anchor supporting the evidence.

ministackRef.description: Upstream tracking ref 'owner/repo#N' (e.g. for upstream-tracked), or null.
